title: rubus doerrii
intro: Rubus doerrii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus doerrii include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rubus doerrii can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
